dashboard.label: GenAI Scoring Configuration
dashboard.description: Configure AI-powered scoring pipelines using Splunk AI Toolkit

panel.html:
Prerequisites: Splunk AI Toolkit must be installed with an LLM connection configured via Connection Management.

Global System Prompt

This prompt is prepended to every scoring pipeline's prompt. It establishes the LLM's role and enforces the JSON output schema. Edit carefully - changes affect all enabled pipelines.

Scoring Pipelines

Configure up to 10 scoring pipelines. Each pipeline sends events to the default LLM with the global system prompt plus a pipeline-specific prompt. Results are written back to index=gen_ai_log with fields gen_ai.<name>.risk_score, gen_ai.<name>.genai_detected, gen_ai.<name>.confidence, gen_ai.<name>.explanation, and gen_ai.<name>.types.

Loading pipeline configuration...
